termsContent.intro: By using Mbipa, you accept the terms below. Please read them carefully.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance
sections.body: Using Mbipa implies full acceptance of these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the app.

sections.heading: 2. User account
sections.body: You must provide accurate information at sign-up. You are responsible for the confidentiality of your password and any activity from your account.

sections.heading: 3. Acceptable use
sections.body: You agree not to: use Mbipa for illegal activities; attempt to hack the service; share offensive, hateful or harmful content; impersonate someone else.

sections.heading: 4. Nature of the service
sections.body: Mbipa is an AI-based wellbeing companion. It does not replace a doctor, psychologist or any health professional. In an emergency, contact your local emergency service immediately.

sections.heading: 5. Subscription and payment
sections.body: Some features are included in paid plans (Premium, Pro). Payments are handled via Stripe. You can cancel at any time from your profile.

sections.heading: 6. Intellectual property
sections.body: Content generated by Mbipa, the interface, the voices and the visuals are protected. You retain ownership of your messages but grant Mbipa a limited license to process them and improve the service.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of liability
sections.body: Mbipa is provided "as is". We do not guarantee uninterrupted, error-free service or that no data will be lost. Our liability is limited to the maximum permitted by law.

sections.heading: 8. Termination
sections.body: We may suspend or delete your account in case of breach of these terms. You can delete your account at any time from Profile → Danger zone.

sections.heading: 9. Governing law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the law applicable in your country of residence. Any dispute will be handled by the competent courts.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.body: For any question: legal@mbipa.app

privacyContent.intro: Your privacy matters. This page explains, in plain English, what Mbipa collects, why, and the controls you have.

sections.heading: Data we collect
sections.body:
Account: email address, first name, last name, age, gender, location.
Content: messages you send to your companion (Bagaza or Yassingou), wellbeing test answers, music listening choices.
Technical: device type, app version, anonymized error logs.

sections.heading: Why we use this data
sections.body:
• To provide the wellbeing coaching service (personalized replies).
• To track your progress on psychological tests.
• To secure your account and prevent abuse.
• To improve the app via aggregated, anonymous statistics.

sections.heading: Sharing with third parties
sections.body: Mbipa relies on Microsoft Azure (response generation + voice) and Firebase (authentication). No data is sold to advertisers. Voice transcripts are processed in memory for transcription and are not stored.

sections.heading: Retention
sections.body: Conversations are kept as long as you keep your account. You can delete your account at any time from Profile → Danger zone. Deletion is final and removes your data within 30 days.

sections.heading: Your rights (GDPR)
sections.body: You can access, correct, export or delete your data. For any request, write to privacy@mbipa.app. We respond within 30 days.

sections.heading: Security
sections.body: Your data is encrypted in transit (HTTPS/TLS 1.2+) and at rest. Internal access is restricted and logged. We never read your individual conversations.

sections.heading: Clinical disclaimer
sections.body: Mbipa is a wellbeing companion, not a substitute for a mental health professional. In case of distress, contact a local emergency service or a healthcare professional.

aboutContent.intro: Mbipa is a wellbeing companion designed to walk with you every day, with kindness and without judgment.

sections.heading: Our mission
sections.body: Make psychological support accessible to everyone, in your language, at your pace. Mbipa offers two real-voice companions — Bagaza and Yassingou — to help you manage stress, anxiety and sleep.

sections.heading: How it works
sections.body:
1. Chat freely with your companion, by text or voice.
2. Take validated tests (PHQ-9, GAD-7…) to track your wellbeing.
3. Listen to music tailored to your mood.
4. Book a session with a therapist if you wish.

sections.heading: Technologies
sections.body: Mbipa uses Microsoft Azure OpenAI for conversations, Azure Speech for neural voices, and Firebase for authentication. Everything is built to respect your privacy.

sections.heading: Disclaimer
sections.body: Mbipa does not replace a mental health professional. In case of distress, contact an emergency service or a qualified therapist.

aboutContent.credit: Founded by Sehass Digital and Complexe Tinam.

helpContent.intro: Quickly find an answer to your question. If you don't, contact our team.

faqs.a: No. Mbipa is a daily wellbeing companion. For clinical follow-up, consult a mental health professional. You can book a session with a partner therapist from the Profile tab.
Yes. Your messages are encrypted in transit and at rest. No one at Mbipa reads your conversations individually. For more details, see the Privacy policy.

faqs.q: How do I change my companion's voice?
faqs.a: In the Chat tab, tap the "switch friend" icon at the top right of the portrait to switch between Bagaza (male voice) and Yassingou (female voice).
Make sure you've granted microphone permission to Mbipa in your phone settings. On Android: Settings → Apps → Mbipa → Permissions.

faqs.q: How do I cancel my subscription?
faqs.a: From Profile → Account → Subscription, you can see your current plan and cancel it. Premium access stays active until the end of the current period.
Yes. Profile → Danger zone → Delete my account. Deletion is final and all your data is erased within 30 days.
Conversations and voices require Internet. Your past tests and preferences are available offline in read-only mode.
